name: Chocolate Marshmallow Cookie Bars
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Milk Chocolate Candy Bars, Broken into Small Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a 13 x 9-inch (33 x 23 cm) baking pan with shortening.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the shortening, brown sugar, egg, and vanilla extract. Beat until well blended.
3. In another bowl, mix together graham cracker crumbs, flour, and salt. Add to the creamed mixture and stir at low speed until just combined. Spread dough evenly into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 13 to 15 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned and set. Do not overbake. Allow to cool completely.
5. In a heavy saucepan, heat whipping cream; remove from heat. Add chocolate pieces and stir until melted and smooth. Stir in marshmallows. Spread evenly over the cooled crust. Refrigerate until firm, at least 2 hours. Cut into bars. Makes: 3 dozen bars
